name: pnas-nexus-skills
description: An opinionated agent skill stack for manuscripts targeted at PNAS Nexus, the fully open-access multidisciplinary sibling journal of PNAS, published by Oxford University Press on behalf of the U.S. National Academy of Sciences.

plugins.name: pnas-nexus-skills
plugins.description: Twelve-skill bundle covering the PNAS Nexus manuscript lifecycle: workflow router, scope/significance fit (with the PNAS-to-Nexus transfer route), gold open access + APC + license selection (replaces flagship PNAS's submission-track choice), the 50-120-word Significance Statement, <=250-word abstract, main-text writing with article types + page-based budget + in-text Materials and Methods, display items, statistics & reproducibility (incl. Registered Reports), mandatory data/code availability with raw-image retention, references format-neutral at submission, submission preflight, and reviewer rebuttal.
